description: These slip-ons from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be worn with everything: from casual jeans and tees to skirts and dresses.UpperWide strap covering the forefoot and anklesCombination of braid work and metal beads for added styleHeel cup with zippered opening for easy insertion and removal of the feetFabric lining for extra comfortFootbed in ergonomic design with ethnic pattern for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
